---
title: "_________________________________________"
author: "Prueba 2 SOL114"
format: pdf
editor: visual
mainfont: "Trixie-Text"
monofont: "Trixie-Text"
sansfont: "Trixie-Text"
geometry:
  - left=.5in
  - textwidth=5.5in
  - marginparsep=.25in
  - marginparwidth=2.25in
---



5.  La siguiente tabla muestra las notas en la prueba 1, prueba 2 y nota final (promedio de ambas) en el curso SOL3212.


| Estudiante | Prueba 1 | Prueba 2 | Nota final |
|------------|----------|----------|------------|
| Juan       | 6.5      | 6.2      | 6.35       |
| María      | 5.8      | 5.5      | 5.65       |
| Carlos     | 6.7      | 5.9      | 6.3        |
| Ana        | 6.0      | 5.4      | 5.7        |
| Felipe     | 4.5      | 5.0      | 4.75       |
| Sofia      | 6.8      | 6.7      | 6.75       |
| Gabriel    | 5.2      | 5.9      | 5.55       |
| Valeria    | 6.3      | 6.5      | 6.4        |
| Roberto    | 5.0      | 5.3      | 5.15       |
| Laura      | 6.4      | 6.6      | 6.5        |
| **$\sum{x_i}$** | **59.4** | **58.9** | **59.15** |
| **$\sum{(x_i - \overline{x})^2}$** | **2.475** | **2.41** | **0.5475** |
